title: lysimachia chekiangensis
intro: Lysimachia chekiangensis, also known as Chekiang loosestrife, is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lysimachia chekiangensis include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating gastrointestinal issues. Lysimachia chekiangensis is often prepared as a decoction, tincture, or tea, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulations.
